sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,TP,PC,Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data2',Co,GL,TP,PC,Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
Update TransX set TP = Co where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = '2008'
Update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,5) + '01' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,TP,PC,Amt1) (select KeyID,GL,TP,'4059000000' as PC,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,GL,TP)
insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,TP,PC,Amt1) (select KeyID,GL,TP,PC,round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not PC = '4059000000' group by KeyID,GL,TP,PC)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or not Co is NULL)
update TransX set ProdCode = 'UNKNOWN' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Product = 1
update TransX set AccYr = '9999' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and AccidentYear = 1
update TransX set ReinLoc = 'UNKN' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and InsurerLocation = 1
update TransX set RiskTerr = 'UNKN' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RiskLocation = 1
update TransX set Broker = 'UNKNOWN' from TransX t inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation v on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and v.Broker = 1
update TransX set ReinName = 'UNKNOWN' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Cedant = 1
update TransX set TransCode = 'T9999' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation v on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and v.TransCode = 1
Update TransX set Contract = '22373' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = '2300'
Update TransX set Contract = '22370' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = '2400'
Update TransX set Contract = '28936' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = '2450'
Update TransX set Co = '2008',BusCat = '20',UWYR = '9999',Txt = 'Stamford HealthCare PC reclass for [Yr]-[Mo]', Flex8 = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
Update TransX set PK = (case when Amt1 > 0 then '40' else '50' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
